title: Failure to parse standard cell definition

features.name: primitive instance with drive strength specification
features.description: Code should include a primitive instance (not, and, or, etc.) with drive strength specification using (strength1, strength2) syntax before port connections

features.name: celldefine preprocessing directive
features.description: Code should include celldefine and endcelldefine preprocessing directives wrapping a module definition

features.name: inout port on module
features.description: Code should include a module with an inout port used with bidirectional primitive instances
